title: [TUI] Review tui-work and attempt rebase onto main
description: Assess rewrite branch health, identify major regressions, and attempt local rebase of tui-work onto main with conflict summary and recommendation.

logs.msg: Rebased tui-work onto main successfully. Replayed product commits and skipped metadata-only commits (ai/STATUS, ai/* docs, .tasks churn). New history is 51 commits ahead of main, 0 behind. Range-diff confirms code commits preserved.

Validation: main cargo test -q (511 pass), rebased tui-work cargo test -q (516 pass). cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings fails on branch with 3 lint errors in crates/tui/src/app.rs (collapsible_if) and crates/tui/src/widgets/canvas.rs (type_complexity).

Review finding: tool result rendering regression. src/tui/message_list.rs appends formatted tool result to MessageEntry content, but src/tui/ion_app.rs entry_to_conversation_entry() maps Sender::Tool with tool_meta to ConversationEntry::tool_call using only header label, dropping result content in scrollback. This likely explains visual mismatch from main.
